dialogos.texto_en: Itsuki, I'm here.
Okaaay.\nSorry to keep you waiting.\nI'll finish changing soon, so please wait there.
It looks like they've arrived.
Good grief, what are they plotting?\nThey haven't changed since high school.\nThey're all troublemakers.
Is that including me?
You think you aren't?
(Come to think of it, I had a dream this morning.)
(How many times have I dreamt of that day?\n It's etched so deeply in my mind%p-2;――%p;)
(It was such a terrible nightmare.)
Sorry to keep you waiting.
Am I still dreaming?
It's the final quintuplets game.
If it's true love, you can tell us apart, right?
Ladies and gentlemen, thank you for taking time\nout of your busy schedules\nto attend our wedding reception today.
I am very happy to finally have our wedding ceremony\nin front of everyone who has supported us so far.
It...really has been a long road.
The quintuplets game...
What a joke! Except for Itsuki, you other four!
What are you doing, wearing wedding dresses\nfor this kind of game?\nDo you even know what you're doing?
Sure, it's a bit complicated...
But we just thought of it, you know.
And it's not just for fun.
We're also relatives of the bride.
Well, that's a lie.\nI'm the bride.
No. It's me.
I'm the bride!
You can tell, right, Futaro?
Geez, you idiots...\nJust when I thought\nyou'd become somewhat sensible adults.
It's a relief you still haven't changed.\nBut don't underestimate me.
It's you.
It seems the party is at its peak,\nbut it looks like it's time to wrap things up.
Lastly, a message of gratitude\nfrom the bride to her parents.
To my father, and my mother in heaven,\nI would not be here today\nif it weren't for the both of you.
Although my mother left me when I was young,\nher teachings and her love will always stay with me.
And, Dad.
When I was still young,\nI couldn't accept you.
I'm sure I caused you a lot of worry.\nI'm sorry.
However, over a long period of time,\nI was able to realize\nhow much love my father has poured into us.
Dad.\nThank you so much for being my father.
Once again, I am grateful for my family.\nIt's thanks to my father, mother, and all my sisters,\nI am who I am today.
Huh, me?
You're Ichika.
Ichika, as the eldest quintuplet,\nalways took charge and brought everyone together.
Also, she showed us a way of life\nwhere dreams can come true.
Her great success as an actress\nis both my goal and my admiration.
Oh, is that so? You surprised me.
You are correct.
It brings back memories.\nYou gave me quite a hard time, you know.
People call you a cool beauty,\nbut I'm not fooled.
You're indulgent, dull,\nlazy, and you sleep too much.
Y-you didn't have to go THAT far...
But even so,\nyour determination to be strong appeared dazzling to me.\nYou're an amazing big sister.
What the? Why now, all of a sudden?
Hmph. While I've got the chance,\njust let me say what I want to say.
You're up next, Nino.
Nino has been the slightly stricter big sister.\nShe also had her moments of being short-tempered as well.
However, that strictness\ncame from her being concerned about us.
She's a reliable older sibling\nwho always thinks about her sisters.
That's right!
Good job, you got it, you got it!\nNext!
Why, at a time like this...
You just need to identify Itsuki.
Your strength is in your compassion for others. \nEven though you act tough, I suppose it's because \nyou have so much love to give.
I couldn't find the answer at that time.\nI'm sorry.
It's okay...\nI...have no regrets...
I see.
Miku, yeah?
Yup.
Miku is also a reliable older sister.\nHer strength has given me courage countless times.
I deeply respect Miku\nfor staying true to her own feelings\nand achieving her dreams.
Sometimes I get worried...\nAm I...doing okay...?
There's no need for me to even answer that.
You've always fought against your insecurities. \nAnd as a result you've accomplished so much and more.
Believe in yourself.\nYou are and always have been capable of great things.
I thought you'd say that.\nThank you, Futaro.
Yotsuba.
...Yes.
Yotsuba is more like a friend than an older sister.
We've advised one another,\nasked favors from each other...\nAnd sometimes caused some trouble.
However, her always kind and accepting\nattitude makes me realize\nthat she truly is my older sister.
You keep helping people, even now.\nThat's because it's what you want to do, right?
I'm sorry for being presumptuous, but I hope you\ncontinue to be that kind of person in the future.\nAs someone who was helped by you, I wish for that.
Of course.\nIt's the path I've chosen and walked on my own.
Please don't say that it's presumptuous of you.\nI'm happy to know that I'm being acknowledged.
Yeah.
And, the last one is you, Itsuki.\nYep. I got a perfect score.
Well, that was easy...\nI guess it's not surprising anymore.
If my sisters weren't here,\nmy life would have been completely different.
You can't help but grow when you've been together this long. \nI may have been the tutor at first but I've learned so much from all of you.
My four sisters were like teachers to me.\nEven though being the youngest of the quintuplets\nmay seem tough%p-2;――
I feel really blessed to have been born a sister\nto all of you.
Meeting you quintuplets\nis one of my proudest achievements.
We may be a little different\nfrom what is considered normal,\nand perhaps others see us as peculiar, but%p-2;――
I love my family, so much.
